description: Sample evaluation output format for reference

ad_text.primary_text: Your child's SAT score doesn't have to be a source of stress. Our expert tutors have helped 10,000+ students raise their scores by an average of 200 points. Start with a free practice test today.
ad_text.headline: Expert SAT Prep That Works
ad_text.description: 1-on-1 tutoring tailored to your student's needs

clarity.rationale: Single clear message: expert tutoring raises SAT scores. The 200-point stat anchors the value immediately.
clarity.contrastive: A 10.0 version would frontload the 200-point stat as the first 5 words rather than burying it after the empathy opener.

value_proposition.rationale: Specific and differentiated: 200-point average improvement with 10,000+ social proof.
value_proposition.contrastive: A 10.0 version would add a time dimension ('in just 8 weeks') to make the benefit more concrete.

cta.rationale: 'Start Free Practice Test' is specific, low-friction (free), and action-oriented. Matches conversion funnel.
cta.contrastive: A 10.0 version might add micro-urgency ('Takes 15 Minutes') to reduce perceived commitment further.

brand_voice.rationale: Empowering and results-focused. Slightly generic — could be any tutoring company.
brand_voice.contrastive: A 9.5 version would include a distinctly Varsity Tutors element like 1-on-1 expert matching.

emotional_resonance.rationale: Addresses parent anxiety ('source of stress') and offers relief through social proof. Functional but not deeply emotional.
emotional_resonance.contrastive: A 9.0 version would paint a transformation picture: 'Imagine your student walking into test day confident.'
